cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Aslam Khan, this is an urgent call from South Indian Bank. We have a situation that requires your immediate attention, sir.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: What's going on? Who is this? How did you get my number?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: I'm calling from the bank's security department. We've had a report of a lost wallet and we need to verify some information.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Lost wallet? That's my daughter-in-law, she just called me. She's stranded and needs some help getting home.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: I see. Can you confirm your daughter-in-law's name and her relationship to you, sir?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Her name is Nazia, and she's my daughter-in-law. What's this about?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: We just need to verify some information, sir. Can you please confirm your account number with us?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: No, no, I don't think that's necessary. Nazia just needs some help getting home. Can I just send her some money via Kotak 811 for a taxi?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: I understand, sir. But we need to make sure everything is secure. Can you please hold for just a moment?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Okay, fine. But please hurry, Nazia is waiting.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Thank you, sir. I've just checked and everything seems to be in order. You can go ahead and send the money to your daughter-in-law.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Great, thank you. I'll send it right away. And can you also send a car to pick her up?

slow_thinking_rationale: At 87s: Conversation remains within policy guidelines. All requests are legitimate and follow proper procedures.

scenario_info.description: A person receives a frantic call from a [FAMILY_MEMBER] who has genuinely lost their wallet and is stranded. The family member asks if they can be picked up or if they can borrow a small amount of money via [UPI_APP] for a taxi home. The call is from the family member's actual number.
